name: Vanity Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat lard in a deep fryer to 350°F (or until the oil reaches a depth of 3 inches and is hot).
2. In a bowl, beat the egg and salt together for one full minute.
3. Gradually add flour, about ¼ cup at a time, beating after each addition until the batter becomes too stiff to beat but still soft enough not to roll out.
4. Cover a dinner plate with flour.
5. Using a teaspoon, portion the batter onto the floured plate into six separate portions.
6. Dust each portion with flour using a knife, then carefully lower it into the hot fat.
7. Aim for cakes that are limp but compact and will not string as they emerge from the fat.
8. Cook each cake for at least 3.5 minutes, turning them gently if necessary to ensure even cooking.
9. Remove the cakes with a spatula and drain on paper towels before dusting with powdered sugar.
